website_opportunity.statement: Oak & Ember Bakery's website is losing customer inquiries because custom orders require a phone call.
Harbor Light Plumbing's website is losing customer inquiries because the emergency-call button disappears on service pages.
Mendez Family Dental's website is losing customer inquiries because new-patient forms are buried in the navigation.
Riverbend Landscaping's website is losing customer inquiries because visitors cannot request an estimate online.
Cedar Lane Florist's website is losing customer inquiries because wedding visitors cannot view packages or schedule a consultation.
Northline Auto Repair's website is losing customer inquiries because mobile visitors cannot request an appointment.
